Grid.TextBlock:
Welcome to Sea Power, Commander!
In this mission, you will command the USS Yorktown (CG-48) to force the Bab al-Mandab Strait, which connects the Red Sea to the Gulf of Aden and the Indian Ocean. Yemeni forces are attempting to block our passage.
USS Yorktown is an AEGIS cruiser equipped with advanced SPY-1A radar and modern weapons. An E-2C Hawkeye from USS Enterprise is providing additional air and surface surveillance.
ENEMY FORCES:
• Osa-class missile boats
• P6-class torpedo boats
• Petya-class coastal frigate
• MiG-21 fighters with bombs approaching from the northeast
• Land-based SS-N-2 missiles and coastal batteries on the northern shore
• One Krivak-class frigate
RULES OF ENGAGEMENT (ROE):
• You are cleared to destroy all hostile (red) forces.
EMISSIONS CONTROL (EMCON):
• No restrictions. Keep all radars active during the transit.
OBJECTIVE:
• USS Yorktown must survive.
• Reach the marked circle on the map, OR destroy all enemy forces in the strait
Good luck, Commander!
